sourceNotes: Low-confidence cleanup 2026-05-29: Ferryhopper supports Xiropotamos/Xeropotamos as one of Antikythera's few accessible sandy beaches. Terrain was narrowed to sand and unsupported cafe/taverna/parking/shallow-water claims were removed. No wind, wave, calm-water, protection, or final-road claim was added.

Kythira/Antikythera island confidence pass 2026-06-05: Ferryhopper supports Xeropotamos/Xiropotamos as one of Antikythera's few sandy beaches and the Kythira-Antikythera tourist guide supports Antikythera beach context. Promoted to high for identity and sandy terrain only; final access, coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos and live sea/wind claims were not changed.

sourceNotes: Seatrac Phase D2 geocode (2026-06): created from no-match seed "Κύθηρα Καψάλι" (Kythira Kapsali), Kythira, Attica. Nominatim hit nom-way-165374749; Overpass natural=beach corroboration 315 m. Slot via nearest existing beach #145 (315 m). Conservative — access/terrain unknown, amenities only as stated.

seatrac.notes: Seatrac near Agia Pelagia, Diakofti, Paleopoli, Kapsali; installed late spring, withdrawn October.
